info.title: Job Portal API
info.description: API Documentation for Job Portal Application

post.summary: Complete the onboarding process for a job seeker

put.description: Upload a resume file (PDF/DOC/DOCX). The returned `resume_url` will be saved to the candidate's profile.

resume.description: Resume file (PDF, DOC, or DOCX, max 5MB)

post.summary: Add a skill to candidate profile

skill_id.description: ID of the skill to add

delete.summary: Remove a skill from candidate profile

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: UserSkill ID (the junction record ID, not the skill ID)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search jobs by title, company, or location

patch.summary: Accept or reject a job applicant
patch.description: Update the status of a job application. Use `action: accept` to accept or `action: reject` to reject. Optionally provide a `reason`.

profile.description: User profile details (null if not yet completed onboarding)

is_active.description: Activate or deactivate the user account

action.description: Action to perform on the applicant

company_description.example: Technology company focused on innovative solutions

company_description.description: Description of what the company does
company_description.example: Technology company focused on innovative solutions

industry.description: Industry sector the company operates in

company_size.description: Number of employees in the company

location.description: City, Country of the job location

is_active.description: Whether the job listing is active

description.example: We are looking for a talented Senior Software Engineer to join our team...

requirements.example: 5+ years of experience with React and Node.js...

benefits.example: Health insurance, flexible work hours, gym membership...

applicants_count.description: Number of applicants for this job

views_count.description: Number of views for this job posting

post_date.description: Date when the job was posted

applied_job_title.description: Title of the job the candidate applied for

responsibilities.example: Developed a new feature that improved user engagement

description.example: Developed a new feature that improved user engagement
